view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of 'Unique link per meeting (security)' is supported by the linked use case, which explicitly describes the automatic creation of a unique Zoom meeting link for each appointment. The scenario details that a unique Zoom meeting room is created and the link is included in the confirmation email, confirming that the system generates a unique link for each meeting, thus satisfying the requirement. This is further supported by the evidence that the link expires after the meeting and is never reused, ensuring security.
